scripts.predev:
mkdir -p public && cp node_modules/@wterm/core/wasm/wterm.wasm public/wterm.wasm && cp node_modules/@wterm/ghostty/wasm/ghostty-vt.wasm public/ghostty-vt.wasm && chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null; (command -v portless >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo '
portless is required but not installed. Run: npm i -g portless
See: https://github.com/vercel-labs/portless
' && exit 1))
scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p public && cp node_modules/@wterm/core/wasm/wterm.wasm public/wterm.wasm && cp node_modules/@wterm/ghostty/wasm/ghostty-vt.wasm public/ghostty-vt.wasm && chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null
